Performance Profiler Configuration

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x2b0
Size:
0x4
Source:
stream_regs.rdl

Description

Performance profiler enable and mode controls

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:3] RSVD r 0x0 -
[2] PERF_CLEAR rw 0x0 -
[1] PERF_MODE rw 0x0 -
[0] PERF_EN rw 0x0 -

Field Descriptions

RSVD

Reserved

PERF_CLEAR

Performance profiler clear - write 1 to clear counters

PERF_MODE

Performance profiler mode - 0=count, 1=histogram

PERF_EN

Performance profiler enable
